displayNameZh: shadcn-ui Skill 网站成果展示
summary: Yt Shadcn Results component for Remotion.
summaryZh: 适用于 Remotion 的「shadcn-ui Skill 网站成果展示」组件。

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/yt-shadcn-results/src/YtShadcnResults.tsx` into your Remotion project, import `YtShadcnResults` and `ytShadcnResultsDefaultProps`, then register the composition.
artifact.agentPrompt: Add the Yt Shadcn Results Remotion asset from remotionhub/remotionhub-assets at remotion/yt-shadcn-results to my project. Preserve the exported YtShadcnResultsProps API and register the YtShadcnResults composition with the default props.
